channel.title: .js or .jsx, there is a difference between them?
channel.description: Hi there. I've watched several Frontity Talks on Youtube - and I want to thank you for that - and suddenly I wondered what is difference between file.js and file.jsx. Which one is best to use ? So far, I didn't see differences :thinking:

item.title: .js or .jsx, there is a difference between them?
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @mickceb

This page in the React docs explains JSX in detail.

You might also find this page or this page useful.

Read full topic
item.source: .js or .jsx, there is a difference between them?

item.title: .js or .jsx, there is a difference between them?
item.dc:creator: mickceb
item.description:
Hi there.
I’ve watched several Frontity Talks on Youtube - and I want to thank you for that - and suddenly I wondered what is difference between file.js and file.jsx.
Which one is best to use ?
So far, I didn’t see differences

Read full topic
item.source: .js or .jsx, there is a difference between them?
